name: Energy Density Calculator
description: Calculate energy density (Wh/kg) of your drone battery.
formula: Energy Density (Wh/kg) = Battery Energy (Wh) / Battery Weight (kg)
formulaDescription: Energy density measures how much energy is stored per unit weight, indicating battery efficiency for drone applications.

example.explanation: A 58 Wh battery weighing 260g has an energy density of 223 Wh/kg, typical for modern LiPo batteries.

faqs.question: What is a good energy density for drone batteries?
faqs.answer: Modern LiPo batteries range from 150-250 Wh/kg. Higher values indicate better performance relative to weight.

faqs.question: Why is energy density important for drones?
faqs.answer: Higher energy density means more flight time with less weight, improving payload capacity and overall drone performance.
